gates.name: Per-Agent Data Gate
gates.next_fix: Need at least 300 official per-agent multi-agent episodes.

gates.name: No Leakage Gate
gates.next_fix: Candidate goals must be train-only; no future endpoint inputs.

gates.name: Strong Baseline Gate
gates.next_fix: Every official dataset/scene needs strongest causal baseline.

gates.name: Per-Agent Model Gate
gates.next_fix: Do not enter Stage 5C. Per-agent deterministic world model is not strong enough.

gates.name: Hard/Failure Gate
gates.next_fix: Need >=10% on hard or baseline-failure subset.

gates.name: Interaction Gate
gates.next_fix: Interaction must improve trajectory metrics, not just auxiliary.

gates.name: Scene/Goal Gate
gates.next_fix: Scene/goal must improve hard/failure or GoalBench subset.

gates.name: Multi-Agent Gate
gates.next_fix: Per-agent all-agent model must beat primary/simple fallback on multi-agent scenes.

gates.name: Verified Long-Horizon Gate
gates.next_fix: Do not claim pedestrian long-horizon world model. Need verified t+50/t+100 pedestrian/drone data.

gates.name: Stage 5C Readiness Gate
gates.evidence: Do not enter Stage 5C. Per-agent deterministic gates and verified long-horizon gate are not satisfied.
gates.next_fix: Pass deterministic and long-horizon gates before latent generative work.
